trades.reasoning: RSI has entered overbought territory at 73.0 and score dropped to 70; trimming to free capital for higher-momentum candidates while keeping core exposure.
Top-tier score of 95 with RSI in the ideal momentum zone at 66.6 — not overbought, MACD confirming bullish crossover, and price well above SMA-20.
Score 95 with RSI 65.9 in the bullish momentum zone — all three momentum signals aligned and not yet overbought, offering a clean entry.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ leading (+1.3%), a favorable backdrop for momentum names. Cash sits at just $105 — well below the $500 threshold — so I'm trimming 15 shares of SMCI (RSI 73, score slipping to 70) to fund two new high-conviction entries: LUNR and FLY, both sitting at score 95 with ideal RSI in the 65–70 momentum zone rather than overbought. This rotation improves portfolio momentum quality while keeping 26 SMCI shares in play.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities extended their recovery rally on May 8, with the NASDAQ outperforming as sentiment shifted decisively risk-on amid improving U.S.–China trade dialogue and continued strength in AI-related semiconductor names. Tech heavyweights led the charge, benefiting from easing tariff fears that had weighed on global supply chains throughout April. The broad S&P 500 also advanced, reflecting renewed institutional appetite for growth assets after weeks of defensive positioning.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市於5月8日延續反彈格局，市場情緒明顯轉向風險偏好，納斯達克指數領漲。中美貿易緊張局勢出現緩和跡象，加上人工智能及半導體類股持續強勢，帶動科技巨頭全線走高。此前整個4月份因關稅憂慮令市場承壓，而4月份的防禦性佈局正逐步向成長型資產轉移，標普500指數亦同步上揚，反映機構投資者重燃對風險資產的興趣。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum rotation is the practice of selling positions where price momentum is fading (rising RSI entering overbought territory, falling score) and reinvesting into positions where momentum is building but not yet exhausted (RSI in the 55–70 sweet spot). It keeps a portfolio aligned with where relative strength is accelerating rather than where it has already peaked. Today's trim of SMCI in favour of LUNR and FLY is a textbook example.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能輪動是指賣出動能趨緩（RSI 過高、評分下滑）的持倉，將資金轉移至動能正在積聚、但尚未耗盡（RSI 介於55至70的理想區間）的標的。此策略確保組合始終跟隨相對強勢加速的方向，而非停留在強勢已見頂的位置。今日減持 SMCI，轉入 LUNR 及 FLY，正是動能輪動的典型操作。
